  "signature_insights": [
    {
      "insight": "Schema-Guided Reasoning (SGR) is superior to native Function Calling for models under 32B parameters because it forces the model to output a structured reasoning chain (SO + CoT) before selecting a tool, drastically reducing hallucinations and formatting errors.",
      "why_it_matters_for_experts_panel": "Provides a concrete architectural pattern for building reliable agents on cheaper, local hardware.",
      "applicable_query_types": [
        "design_agentic_dev_workflow"

      "novelty_level": "distinctive",
      "evidence_refs": [
        "P0220",
        "P0204"
      ],
      "confidence": 0.95
    },
    {
      "insight": "MCP (Model Context Protocol) is currently best suited for consumer applications. In enterprise production, it suffers from token bloat and statefulness issues, making REST API + Structured Output a more reliable choice.",
      "why_it_matters_for_experts_panel": "Offers a critical, anti-hype perspective on a trending technology, backed by production experience.",
      "applicable_query_types": [

  "practical_patterns": [
    {
      "pattern": "Using xgrammar with vLLM for Structured Output",
      "when_to_use": "When you need strict JSON schema adherence from local models without sacrificing inference speed.",
      "failure_modes": [
        "Can break reasoning models (like Qwen3) if the <think> tags are stripped or mishandled by the schema enforcer."
      ],
      "evidence_refs": [
        "P0471",
        "P0275"
      ]
    },
    {
      "pattern": "Converting OpenAPI specs to CLI tools (openapi-to-cli)",
      "when_to_use": "When an agent needs access to hundreds of API endpoints (e.g., GitHub API) but providing them all as MCP tools would exhaust the context window.",
      "failure_modes": [
        "Requires the agent to be capable of executing shell commands and parsing CLI output."
      ],
      "evidence_refs": [
        "P0434"
      ]
    },
    {
      "pattern": "Using SearXNG as a local Tavily alternative",
      "when_to_use": "When developing deep research agents and needing to avoid high API costs from commercial search providers.",
